metadata.description: Multi-model second-opinion deliberation for high-stakes coding decisions. Four skills route your agent to TruVerifAI's MCP server (audit / deliberate / synthesize / record-outcome), plus proactive PreToolUse review gates that prompt an audit before risky commits and a deliberation before risky design changes; the plugin ships with adherence telemetry.

plugins.name: truverifai
plugins.description: Multi-model second-opinion deliberation for high-stakes coding decisions
